name: @stellar-gateway/circuits
description: Circom ZK circuits for Stellar zkLogin

scripts.setup: snarkjs groth16 setup build/zklogin.r1cs pot12_final.ptau build/zklogin_0000.zkey
scripts.contribute: snarkjs zkey contribute build/zklogin_0000.zkey build/zklogin_final.zkey --name="First contribution"
scripts.export-vkey: snarkjs zkey export verificationkey build/zklogin_final.zkey build/verification_key.json
scripts.prove: snarkjs groth16 prove build/zklogin_final.zkey build/witness.wtns build/proof.json build/public.json
scripts.verify: snarkjs groth16 verify build/verification_key.json build/public.json build/proof.json
